summary: Exact pixel selection of a half-open rectangle [x0, x1) x [y0, y1) within the input image; the rect must lie fully inside the input extent.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The cropped image (extent = rect width x height; all other descriptor fields preserved).

params.name: rect
params.doc: The half-open crop rectangle {x0, y0, x1, y1} in input pixel space; upper bounds are exclusive and must lie within the input extent.

perceptual.reason: image.crop is an exact verbatim sub-window copy verified by pixel-selection fixtures, half-open boundary cases, and the crop/pad round-trip identity; there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
